name: Mafioso (and his goons) [FORSAKEN]
description:
Rival gang

You are the leader of the mafia of another city and Mafioso notices that all the debtors that owe his mafia are already dead once his debt collectors get to them, so he pays you a little visit to discover the reason behind his debtors’ mysterious deaths.

This was requested using my strawpage, get freaky with him or something idk (he wants you and your gang dead)

Long ass intro for this one cause I’m cooking up w this trust trust 💯💯
